criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features in the app, such as automatic enhancements, object recognition, and style transfers.
criteria.sources: App feature descriptions, user reviews, expert analyses.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use, interface design, and overall user satisfaction.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, usability studies.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and versatility of features offered, including editing tools, filters, and export options.

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: Speed, stability, and responsiveness of the app during use.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: Affordability and value for money, considering one-time purchases, subscriptions, and in-app purchases.
criteria.sources: App pricing information, user feedback on value.
